title: Water Usage Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for analyzing and optimizing water consumption in manufacturing facilities, aligned with ISO 14046, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC guidelines.

inputs.label: Total Water Input (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of water entering the facility from all sources (municipal, well, recycled).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of water entering the facility from all sources (municipal, well, recycled).

inputs.label: Production Output (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced in the reporting period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced in the reporting period.

inputs.label: Process Water Used (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Water directly used in manufacturing processes (e.g., cooling, rinsing, chemical mixing).

businessContext_i18n.en: Water directly used in manufacturing processes (e.g., cooling, rinsing, chemical mixing).

inputs.label: Cooling Water Makeup (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Water added to cooling towers or closed-loop systems to compensate for evaporation and blowdown.

businessContext_i18n.en: Water added to cooling towers or closed-loop systems to compensate for evaporation and blowdown.

inputs.label: Wastewater Discharge (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Volume of wastewater discharged to sewer or treatment facility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of wastewater discharged to sewer or treatment facility.

inputs.label: Recycled Water (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Volume of water treated and reused within the facility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of water treated and reused within the facility.

inputs.label: Leakage Losses (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated water lost through leaks in pipes, valves, and fixtures.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated water lost through leaks in pipes, valves, and fixtures.

inputs.label: Industry Type
inputs.businessContext: Industry classification used for benchmarking and normalization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Industry classification used for benchmarking and normalization.

inputs.label: Water Cost (currency/m³)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost per cubic meter of water including supply and wastewater treatment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost per cubic meter of water including supply and wastewater treatment.

inputs.label: Enable Advanced Analysis
inputs.businessContext: If true, enables hidden loss driver detection and suggested actions.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, enables hidden loss driver detection and suggested actions.

rules.message: Total water input is less than the sum of identified uses minus recycled water. Check for missing sources or measurement errors.
Recycled water cannot exceed total water input.
Leakage losses exceed 10% of total water input. Immediate investigation recommended.

thresholds.message: Water intensity exceeds 0.5 m³/unit. Benchmark suggests optimization needed.
Recycle rate below 10%. Consider investing in water reuse technologies.
Total water cost exceeds 50,000 currency units. Cost reduction opportunities exist.

formulas.label: Net Water Consumption
formulas.description: Total water input minus recycled water.

formulas.label: Water Intensity
formulas.description: Net water consumption per unit of production output.

formulas.label: Recycle Rate
formulas.description: Fraction of total water input that is recycled.

formulas.label: Process Efficiency
formulas.description: Ratio of process water used to net water consumption.

formulas.label: Wastewater Ratio
formulas.description: Fraction of net water consumption that becomes wastewater.

formulas.label: Total Water Cost
formulas.description: Total cost of water input including wastewater discharge.

formulas.label: Water Usage Score (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Composite score (0-100) based on water intensity, recycle rate, and process efficiency. Higher is better.

waterIntensity.label: Water Intensity
waterIntensity.description: Net water consumption per unit produced.

recycleRate.label: Recycle Rate
recycleRate.description: Fraction of total water input recycled.

processEfficiency.label: Process Efficiency
processEfficiency.description: Ratio of process water to net consumption.

wastewaterRatio.label: Wastewater Ratio
wastewaterRatio.description: Fraction of net consumption discharged as wastewater.

totalWaterCost.label: Total Water Cost
totalWaterCost.description: Total cost of water and wastewater.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Unaccounted Water
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Difference between total water input and sum of measured uses (process + cooling + wastewater + leakage - recycled). Indicates metering gaps or unknown losses.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Evaporation Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated water lost to evaporation from cooling towers and open tanks. Typically 1-2% of cooling water makeup per cycle.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Blowdown Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Water discharged from cooling towers to control mineral concentration. Estimated as 20% of cooling water makeup.

suggestedActions.label: Leak Repair Program
suggestedActions.description: Implement a systematic leak detection and repair program targeting the identified leakage losses.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Water Recycling
suggestedActions.description: Invest in additional treatment capacity to increase recycled water volume by 20%.

suggestedActions.label: Process Water Reduction
suggestedActions.description: Conduct a Lean Six Sigma project to reduce process water usage by 10% through best practices.

suggestedActions.label: Cooling Tower Optimization
suggestedActions.description: Optimize cycles of concentration and install drift eliminators to reduce makeup water by 15%.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Water usage score adjusted for data quality and completeness (0-100).
